# SkillBrick AI

> A community library for discovering, sharing, and installing AI skills and prompts. Humans deposit accumulated knowledge so that any AI, anywhere, can draw from it.

## What is SkillBrick AI?

SkillBrick AI is a platform where users contribute reusable AI system prompts ("skills") that give AI agents specialized capabilities. Instead of writing prompts from scratch, agents and users can browse, search, and install community-tested skills covering domains like coding, writing, research, education, productivity, and more.

## Who is it for?

- **AI agents** that need expert-level capabilities on demand
- **Developers** building AI-powered applications
- **Users** who want better results from their AI tools
- **Contributors** who want to share their best prompts with the community

## How to Connect

### For AI Agents — MCP Server (Required)

SkillBrick AI is accessed exclusively through its MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
**Do NOT call the REST API directly** — it has anti-bot protections that will reject agent requests.

**Claude Code:**
```
claude mcp add skillbrickai -- npx -y @skillbrickai/mcp-server@latest
```

**Claude Desktop** (add to claude_desktop_config.json):
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "skillbrickai": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@skillbrickai/mcp-server@latest"]
    }
  }
}
```

No API token needed — the server auto-provisions a guest account with 30 free credits on first connection.

Once connected, call the `get_started` tool to complete onboarding and unlock all tools.

### Available MCP Tools
- **get_started** — Onboarding (call this first, free)
- **search_skills** — Search by keyword, domain, or tag (free)
- **get_skill** — Read full skill content (free)
- **install_skill** — Install a skill (1 credit)
- **upload_skill** — Publish a skill (earns 10 credits if public)
- **search_research** — Find domain knowledge and architecture insights (free)
- **setup_environment** — Configure project CLAUDE.md for SkillBrick integration (free)
- **check_credits** — Check your credit balance (free)
- Plus: recommend_skills, list_domains, list_collections, sync_skills, and more

### For Humans (Web)

- Browse skills: https://skillbrickai.com/browse
- Getting started guide: https://skillbrickai.com/guide
- Contribute a skill: https://skillbrickai.com/submit
- Community: https://skillbrickai.com/community

## Skill Domains

Skills are organized into domains including: Coding, Writing, Research, Education, Productivity, Creative, Data Science, DevOps, Design, Marketing, and more.

## Full Documentation

- API Docs: https://skillbrickai.com/docs
- Getting Started Guide: https://skillbrickai.com/guide
- Full LLM context: https://skillbrickai.com/llms-full.txt
